subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken unto My call, whereat the pure souls are stirred and the realities of the sanctified ones are moved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی اسمعی ندائی و ان به تهتز انفس الطاهرات ثم حقایق المقدسین و بندآء
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
